The '''''Stockade''''' was a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleship]].

==History==
The [[Feeorin/Legends|Feeorin]] pirate [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] was held prisoner aboard the ''Stockade'' after being captured by [[Vana Sage]].

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was upgraded with additional weapons systems for service in the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Navy]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]]. Unlike other CIS warships, it was not given blue markings.

{{Ship-stub}}
